Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses By Defendant Hugo Ricardo Solis, Dba Solis Handyman Services And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Paul Alaga, Esq. (415581.0885) of Bryant Law Group for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAUL ROMERO's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses By Defendant Hugo Ricardo Solis, DBA Solis Handyman Services And Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED; sanctions granted in the amount of $1,500.00 against defendant due within 14 days of notice of entry of order.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
